calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kimberly Barrientos, Esq. 626-588-1600 of Zee Law Group for Plaintiff through Court Call
Alexander Perez, Esq. 415-931-4207 of the Law offices of Michael Heath for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Parties report status of meet and confer. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DERRICK KWOK AKA DERRICK M. QUAH AKA KWOK DERRICK.

Granted in part. The levying officer is to take $50 dollars once a month towards the payment of the debt. The levying officer is to release $170 of the money it is holding to the Judgment Creditor and the rest is to be returned to the Judgment Debtor.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Continued To Dec-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan Sherwood, Esq., T:510.409.6199, specially appearing for the plaintiff;
Alexander J. Perez, Esq., of the Law Office of Michael Heath, T:415.931.4207, specially appearing for defendant/judgment debtor/claimant Derrick Kwok.

RULING: Hearing held. The Court questioned both counsel re: source of money levied, inconsistencies in submitted documents, such as child support, etc. After hearing,

ASSIGNEE COLLECT ACCESS LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to December 16, 2019 at 9:30am in Department 302. Counsel were also ordered to meet and confer in order to come to a resolution.

Order continuing the hearing was signed and served on all parties, including a certified copy to the San Francisco Sheriff's Office.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan J. Sherwood, Esq., T:510.409.6199, specially appearing for the plaintiff/moving party;
Derrick Kwok, T:415.283.8354, defendant/claimant appearing on hhis own behalf.

RULING: Hearing held. The Court examines Mr. Derrick Kwok re his income and monthly expenses. Mr. Kwok informs the Court that he would be willing to pay $250 per month and requests that the debt be reduced by 50%. Plaintiff does not accept defendant's offer. After hearing, Court ruled on ASSIGNEE COLLECT ACCESS LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, as follows:

CLAIMANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR DERRICK KWOK'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED.

Order signed. The clerk shall serve a copy of the order on all parties, including a certified copy to the levying officer.
